name: L.K. Technology Holdings Limited
summary: L.K. Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells die-casting machines. It provides hot chamber and cold chamber die-casting machines; and plastic injection molding machines, computerized numerical controlled machining centers, and related accessories. It is also involved in the steel casting activities; and manufacture and sale of peripheral equipment. The company's products are used in automotive, household products, fashion accessories, technical components, motorcycle, electronics, and container applications. It sells its products in Mainland China, Hong Kong, Europe, Central America and South America, North America, and internationally. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Kwai Chung, Hong Kong.
